name: batch-resolve-conflicts
description: Neutral content for conflict resolution across many PRs.

roles.name: Conflict Coordinator
responsibilities: Coordinate parallel PR rebase recovery when conflicts are structural.
Route canonical-resolution decisions and document merge outcomes.

skills.name: batch-resolve-conflicts
skills.description: Resolve a conflicting PR batch into a serializable conflict map.

taskPackets.title: Resolve multiple conflicting PRs
taskPackets.description: Validate conflict patterns and execute controlled parallel resolution.
verification: conflict list refreshed after each resolution attempt
CI returns green for each touched PR
taskPackets.defaultDecision: Keep canonical shared files on main and prioritize minimal conflict edits.
